<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Verification

<!-- List checks run and any checks intentionally left to CI. -->

## Security and compatibility

- [ ] I described changes to authentication, authorization, process execution,
      network exposure, secrets, persistence, or Hermes compatibility.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, private prompts, Hermes home data, generated
      build output, or personal paths.
- [ ] Dependency and GitHub Action changes use lockfiles/immutable SHAs and were
      reviewed as supply-chain changes.
- [ ] User-visible implementation changes are reflected in README/docs; future
      proposals are labeled as such.
- [ ] New bundled assets have provenance and license entries in `ASSETS.md`.
